title: handoff envelope — cross-agent coordination manifest
description: One handoff per cross-agent coordination event. Emitted by /split (federation handoff) or by /alm-extract (handoff to ALM agent). Consumed via MCP handoff_list / handoff_consume. See design/09-orchestration-patterns.md.

id.description: Unique handoff id. Convention: {feature-slug}-{target-agent}-{NNN} where NNN is a same-feature counter.

feature.description: Feature slug. Same name reused on the target side (the target agent's skeleton spec lands at projects/{p}/{targetAgent}/features/{feature}/).

artifactType.description: What this handoff is for. spec-split = /split emitted a skeleton spec; plan-dependency = /plan declared a cross-agent require; alm-extract = handoff to ALM agent for work-item push; brownfield-inventory = brownfield agent published inventory for domain agents to consume; estimation-input = handoff to solution-estimate aggregator.

payload.description: Artifact-type-specific payload. For spec-split: pointer to source spec + scope summary + reason. For plan-dependency: required artifact path. For alm-extract: work-items.yaml delta + section refs. For brownfield-inventory: inventory.json path + module-detection results. For estimation-input: pointer to RFP / requirements doc.
